summary: Shared resend cooldown constant used by auth UIs and hooks.

outputs.description: Cooldown duration in seconds.

notes: Use with stable auth form and cooldown behavior.

summary: Builds the default signup callback URL from the configured app base URL.

outputs.description: Absolute callback URL for signup confirmation.

notes: Use for app-owned signup and invitation flows.

summary: Builds the default password reset redirect URL from the configured app base URL.

outputs.description: Absolute callback URL for password reset.

notes: Use for app-owned password reset flows.

summary: Validates email input for shared auth forms.

outputs.description: True when the email matches the shared BrightWeb validation rules.

notes: Use for starter and app-owned auth form validation.

summary: Validates password input against the shared BrightWeb starter rules.

outputs.description: Boolean validity plus the current rule failures.

notes: Use for starter and app-owned auth form validation.

summary: Resolves the configured auth base URL for other shared auth helpers.

outputs.description: Configured auth base URL.

notes: Do not build app code directly on this helper in v1.

summary: Normalizes raw role values into the shared BrightWeb role union.

outputs.description: Normalized role or null.

notes: Used internally by server auth and admin helpers.

summary: Determines access to the current Insights CMS surface.

outputs.description: True when the role can access the current Insights CMS surface.

notes: Treat this as internal route policy logic in v1.

summary: Chooses the current post-login landing path from the user's role.

outputs.description: Current post-login destination.

notes: Treat this as internal route policy logic in v1.

summary: Client hook for resend cooldown and timer state in auth flows.

outputs.description: Cooldown state and restart controls.

notes: Use for app-owned auth forms and resend flows.

summary: Guards a server page or component and returns the signed-in user context.

outputs.description: Authenticated user context for server components and pages.

notes: Use as the default server entrypoint for authenticated page data.

summary: Guards a server page or component for one or more allowed roles.

outputs.description: Authenticated server context for the allowed role set.

notes: Use for role-gated dashboard pages and layouts.

summary: Returns the current server-side auth and role state without redirecting.

outputs.description: Current auth and role state for the request.

notes: Use when an app needs read-only access to current auth state.

summary: Lower-level user access helper used by the current server auth surface.

outputs.description: Low-level server user access result.

notes: Treat as internal composition for the stable server helpers.

summary: Lower-level role access helper used by the current admin handlers.

outputs.description: Low-level server role access result.

notes: Treat as internal server composition in v1.

summary: Looks up the profile record for a Supabase user.

outputs.description: Resolved profile id or lookup error.

notes: Treat as internal server composition in v1.

summary: Registers the admin navigation and toolbar surfaces in the app shell.
auth: admin visibility applies inside the shell

outputs.description: Shell registration object for admin navigation and actions.

notes: Use when wiring the admin starter into app-shell.

summary: Lists admin-managed users with pagination, search, and role filtering.
auth: admin role required in the caller context

inputs.name: params.supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with admin access.

inputs.name: params.search
inputs.description: Optional case-insensitive name and email search.

outputs.description: Admin users table data with pagination metadata.

notes: Use when building app-owned admin tables or user management screens.

examples.label: List admin users
examples.code: const users = await listAdminUsers({ supabase, page: 1, pageSize: 10, roleFilter: "staff" });

summary: Package-owned GET handler for the starter admin users endpoint.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Incoming request with optional admin user list query parameters.

outputs.description: JSON response containing admin users list data or an error envelope.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

query.name: pageSize
query.description: Page size capped at 100. Defaults to 10.

summary: Package-owned POST handler for bulk admin role changes.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Incoming request with a bulk role change payload.

outputs.description: JSON response containing role change results or an error envelope.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

body.name: profileIds
body.description: One or more profile ids to update.

body.name: newRole
body.description: Target role for the selected profiles.

body.name: reason
body.description: Audit reason for the role change.

success.description: Changed and skipped results plus summary counters.

errors.description: Validation, authentication, or server error envelope.

summary: Starter page helper that loads the first admin users payload for the scaffolded page.

outputs.description: Starter admin page payload containing the first users list.

notes: Replace or compose this helper when a project needs its own admin page shape.

summary: Event names for the packaged admin client surface.

outputs.description: Packaged event names for admin UI wiring.

notes: Do not couple app-owned UI to this event bus in v1.

summary: Dispatches a packaged admin browser event.

outputs.description: No return value.

notes: Treat as internal UI wiring for the packaged admin client.

summary: Dispatches a packaged admin browser custom event with detail payload.

outputs.description: No return value.

notes: Treat as internal UI wiring for the packaged admin client.

summary: Lower-level role mutation helper used by the packaged admin handlers.
auth: admin role required in the caller context

inputs.name: params.supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with admin access.

outputs.description: Changed and skipped results plus summary counters.

notes: Treat as internal server composition in v1.

summary: Packaged admin users table UI used by the current starter surface.
auth: admin role required for the mounted route

outputs.description: Packaged starter UI component.

notes: App-owned admin UI should not depend on this packaged client component in v1.

summary: Registers CRM navigation groups and toolbar surfaces in the app shell.

outputs.description: Shell registration object for CRM navigation and actions.

notes: Use when wiring CRM into the shared shell.

summary: Lists CRM contacts with reusable filtering and pagination.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with CRM schema access.

inputs.name: params
inputs.description: Optional page, pageSize, search, status, organizationId, and ownerProfileId filters.

outputs.description: Paginated CRM contacts plus total counters.

notes: Prefer this helper over dashboard-shaped CRM payloads when building app-owned contact tables and search.

examples.label: Load the first page of contacts
examples.code: const result = await listCrmContacts(supabase, { page: 1, pageSize: 50, status: "lead" });

summary: Lists CRM organizations with reusable search and pagination.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with CRM schema access.

inputs.name: params
inputs.description: Optional page, pageSize, and search filters.

outputs.description: Paginated organizations plus total counters.

notes: Use for app-owned CRM organization lists and selectors.

summary: Returns contact counts grouped by status.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with CRM schema access.

outputs.description: Total CRM contact count plus counts by status.

notes: Use for app-owned CRM overview cards and summaries.

summary: Lists staff and admin owner options for CRM assignment flows.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with CRM schema access.

outputs.description: Deduplicated owner options derived from staff and admin role assignments.

notes: Use for app-owned CRM filters, assignment pickers, and ownership forms.

summary: Package-owned GET handler for CRM contact listing.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Incoming request with optional CRM contact query parameters.

outputs.description: JSON response containing a CRM contacts list payload or an error envelope.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

examples.label: Mount the contacts endpoint
examples.code: export async function GET(request: Request) { const { handleCrmContactsGetRequest } = await import("@brightweblabs/module-crm"); return handleCrmContactsGetRequest(request); }

query.name: pageSize
query.description: Page size capped at 100. Defaults to 50.

query.name: search
query.description: Case-insensitive search across first name, last name, email, and phone.

summary: Package-owned GET handler for CRM organization listing.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Incoming request with optional organization query parameters.

outputs.description: JSON response containing a CRM organizations payload or an error envelope.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

query.name: pageSize
query.description: Page size capped at 100. Defaults to 20.

summary: Package-owned GET handler for CRM contact status stats.

outputs.description: JSON response containing CRM status stats or an error envelope.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

success.description: Total CRM contacts plus counts by status.

summary: Package-owned GET handler for CRM owner options.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Incoming request for CRM owner options.

outputs.description: JSON response containing owner options or an error envelope.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

success.description: Deduplicated owner options for staff and admin profiles.

notes: Replace or compose this helper when a project needs a different CRM page shape.

summary: Registers the projects navigation and toolbar surfaces in the app shell.
auth: route-level visibility applies inside the shell

outputs.description: Shell registration object for projects navigation and actions.

notes: Use when wiring Projects into the shared shell.

summary: Lists projects with reusable filters, pagination, and derived task and milestone stats.
auth: signed-in user with project access required in the caller context

inputs.description: Project filters including search, status, health, owner, dueWindow, page, and pageSize.

outputs.description: Paginated projects list with derived task and milestone stats.

summary: Returns reusable portfolio-level project counters for the current project schema.

inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with project schema access.

outputs.description: Portfolio totals for active, planned, at-risk, and overdue projects.

notes: Use when building app-owned dashboards and portfolio summaries.

notes: Replace or compose this helper when a project needs a different portfolio page shape.

summary: Detects missing-table and missing-column errors for the current starter schema fallback.

notes: Treat as internal fallback logic for the current starter helpers.
